task: ALUX AI Agent Intelligence Daily bilingual publish
schedulePolicy: Preserve the existing OpenClaw schedule and timezone; replace only the task workflow.

translationContract.audience: Global AI Agent, infrastructure, technology and business readers
translationContract.style: Native-level technology intelligence publication: professional, concise, accurate and authoritative; never literal word-for-word translation

steps: Pull the latest main branch and inspect git status.
Resume any unfinished translation or review before starting a new date.
Generate the Chinese report in the current reviewed layout and editorial style.

Create a refined en-US translation for global AI Agent, infrastructure, technology and business readers; complete analysis, initial translation, review and polish, and never translate literally word for word.
Mark the translation reviewed and refresh source/translation hashes.
Build both locales and update both homepages, latest routes, dated routes, archives and sitemap together.
Run structural, hash, link, SEO and multi-viewport rendering checks.
Commit Chinese source, English source, manifest and public output together; push main.
Verify the official domain after Vercel finishes deployment.
atomicReleaseFields: homepage last-updated time derived from the newest reviewedAt
hardGates: No locale may be missing for a published date.
Every translation must be reviewed and match the manifest hashes.
Every English issue must satisfy the translationContract in full; no stage may be skipped or downgraded to literal or browser machine translation.
Chinese and English external source URL sets and structural counts must match.
No unhandled Chinese text may remain in English content.
No horizontal overflow or clipped content at the required viewport matrix.

Every visible label, badge, heading, URL and control stays inside its owning grid or flex cell and does not intersect a non-ancestor sibling; validation uses rendered text ranges rather than element boxes alone.
English heat-row labels use at least a 172px column above 620px, stack at 620px and below, and never cross into or overlap the content column.
English panel headings and their context labels never overlap, and stack at 920px and below.
The visible logo control and language switch are vertically aligned at 44px high, with language targets at least 44px high.
The rendered heat-row overlap gate must pass and must not be bypassed or weakened.
Do not push when any validation fails.
